task_objective: Add pyludusavi version to GUI and implement Ludusavi log viewer
design_decisions: Updated pyludusavi dependency to 0.2.0 as requested.
Added get_log_path to LudusaviAdapter protocol to decouple service from adapter implementation details.
Implemented get_ludusavi_logs RPC to fetch raw Ludusavi logs.
Added LudusaviLogModal to frontend to display the raw logs.
Added pyludusavi version display in the Versions section.
results: All features implemented, tests passing, and protocol checks verified. Ludusavi logs are now viewable in a modal, and pyludusavi version 0.2.0 is correctly displayed.
